name: Algebraic Topology — Part 4: Persistent Homology & TDA
description: Filtrations, persistence modules, birth/death, persistence diagrams, barcodes, stability theorems, Vietoris-Rips, Čech complex. Core of topological data analysis.
mermaid:
graph TD
    RefSimpComp["Simplicial complex (Part 2)"]
    RefHomology["Homology (Parts 1-3)"]
    DefFiltration["Def: Filtration K_0 ⊆ K_1 ⊆ ... ⊆ K_m"]
    DefPersMod["Def: Persistence module"]
    DefBirthDeath["Def: Birth and death of homology class"]
    DefPersDiagram["Def: Persistence diagram"]
    DefBarcode["Def: Barcode"]
    ThmPersDiagram["Thm: Persistence diagram from persistence module"]
    ThmStability["Thm: Stability: small perturbation ⇒ small change in diagram"]
    DefVR["Def: Vietoris-Rips complex VR(ε)"]
    DefCech["Def: Čech complex Cech(ε)"]
    ThmNerve["Thm: Nerve theorem: Cech ≃ union of balls"]
    LemVRCech["Lem: VR and Cech interleaving"]
    ThmRips["Thm: Vietoris-Rips for metric spaces"]
    DefPersistence["Def: Persistent homology H_k(K_t)"]
    CorBarcode["Cor: Barcode encodes persistence"]
    CorTDA["Cor: TDA pipeline: data → filtration → barcode"]
    RefSimpComp --> DefFiltration
    RefHomology --> DefPersMod
    DefFiltration --> DefPersMod
    DefPersMod --> DefBirthDeath
    DefBirthDeath --> DefPersDiagram
    DefBirthDeath --> DefBarcode
    DefPersMod --> ThmPersDiagram
    ThmPersDiagram --> ThmStability
    RefSimpComp --> DefVR
    RefSimpComp --> DefCech
    DefCech --> ThmNerve
    DefVR --> LemVRCech
    DefCech --> LemVRCech
    LemVRCech --> ThmRips
    DefFiltration --> DefPersistence
    RefHomology --> DefPersistence
    DefPersistence --> CorBarcode
    ThmPersDiagram --> CorBarcode
    ThmStability --> CorTDA
    CorBarcode --> CorTDA
    classDef ref fill:#bdc3c7,color:#333,stroke:#95a5a6
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lemma fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef corollary fill:#1abc9c,color:#fff,stroke:#16a085
    class RefSimpComp,RefHomology ref
    class DefFiltration,DefPersMod,DefBirthDeath,DefPersDiagram,DefBarcode,DefVR,DefCech,DefPersistence definition
    class LemVRCech lemma
    class ThmPersDiagram,ThmStability,ThmNerve,ThmRips theorem
    class CorBarcode,CorTDA corollary
